hero.subtitle: Run your operations. Not just your reports.
hero.description: Systems that connect execution, reporting, and decision-making in one controlled layer

sections.title: Built for Institutional Environments
sections.description: Beyond Code builds operational intelligence systems that run inside real institutions.

sections.title: Our Mission
sections.description: Close the gap between AI capability and real execution.

sections.title: Our Approach
sections.description: Systems are designed to align with:
list: Institutional governance structures
Existing operational workflows
Reporting frameworks
Infrastructure environments

items.title: The Problem
items.description: Institutions don’t fail because of technology. They fail because nothing is connected.

items.title: Our Solution
items.description: We build systems that run operations end-to-end

systems.title: Agentic Institutional Intelligence
systems.description: Real-time decision support across your operations

systems.title: Institutional Policy-Linked Reporting
impact: Up to 15× faster report generation

cards.title: Intelligence & Predictive Systems
cards.description: Make decisions faster with built-in intelligence

cards.title: Operational Intelligence Systems
cards.description: See what’s happening across your operations in real time

cards.title: Automation Systems
cards.description: Remove manual work from core processes

cards.title: Custom Intelligence Development
cards.description: Built around how your organization actually operates

technology.title: Technology Stack
technology.description: Systems built on modern AI and infrastructure layers

items.title: AI Assistants
items.description: Internal assistants trained on your systems, embedded into workflows

items.title: Workflow Automation
items.description: Processes that run without manual coordination

getsbuilds.title: How It Gets Built
getsbuilds.description: Beyond Code follows a 4-stage deployment methodology.

processes.title: Engineer
processes.description: Build integrations and an intelligence layer

items.title: Hybrid Deployment
items.description: Connects legacy systems with modern intelligence

leadership.title: Leadership
items: Built by operators who understand how institutions actually run.
We design systems that transition seamlessly from structure to execution within real-world environments.

items.question: What does Beyond Code do?
items.answer: Beyond Code designs and deploys operational intelligence systems that integrate AI, automation, and data infrastructure to improve execution, reporting, and decision-making within institutional environments.

items.question: How are your systems different from traditional AI tools?
items.answer: Our systems are built around your workflows and reporting structure, not just prompts. They automate execution, provide visibility, and support measurable operational outcomes.

items.question: Can your systems integrate with our existing platforms?
items.answer: Yes, we can integrate with CRMs, ERPs, internal dashboards, APIs, and cloud platforms depending on your infrastructure.

items.question: How long does implementation take?
items.answer: Most pilot deployments take 2–6 weeks depending on complexity, data readiness, and stakeholder alignment.

items.question: Do you offer a pilot or trial before full deployment?
items.answer: Yes — we typically offer a pilot engagement before full deployment. This allows us to validate workflows and align the system with your team’s real-world processes before scaling to a full implementation.

items.question: How secure are your systems?
items.answer: Security is built into every layer of our systems. We follow best practices for data encryption, access control, and secure integrations.

items.question: Will we retain ownership of our data and systems?
items.answer: Yes — you retain full ownership of your data, systems, and all operational intelligence assets at every stage of deployment.

items.question: What kind of results can we expect?
items.answer: You can expect streamlined workflows, stronger operational visibility, faster decision-making, and measurable improvements in efficiency, accuracy, and execution outcomes.

hero.subtitle: Test the system in your environment before scaling.

footer.companyDescription: AI operational intelligence infrastructure for institutional execution and reporting automation.

form.title: Let’s discuss how we can transform your operations with intelligent systems.

casestudy.title: System capability
casestudy.description: Evaluates the system’s ability to deliver core intelligence functions, including data processing, automation...

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: OpsIntel Solutions is a large enterprise organization facing challenges in operational visibility, reporting inefficiencies, and delayed decision-making due to fragmented systems and manual workflows.

challenge.title: Challenge
challenge.sub_title: Despite investing in digital tools, OpsIntel Solutions struggled with:
list: Lack of real-time operational visibility
Heavy reliance on manual reporting processes
Disconnected systems across departments
Delays in executive decision-making
Inefficient data retrieval and workflow bottlenecks
challenge.description: These challenges limited the organization’s ability to scale efficiently and respond to operational demands.

solution.title: Solution
solution.sub_title: A structured Operational Intelligence System was deployed to integrate workflows, automate reporting, and enable real-time decision support.
list: Deployment of AI-powered operational intelligence assistants
Integration with ERP systems and internal databases
Automated reporting infrastructure with real-time dashboards
Workflow automation and execution tracking systems
Centralized knowledge and document intelligence system

system_capability.title: System Capability
system_capability.sub_title: The system was engineered to handle complex operational environments with:
list: Real-time data processing and intelligence generation
Seamless integration across multiple platforms
Scalable infrastructure aligned with organizational growth
Secure deployment within internal infrastructure

integration_readiness.title: Integration Readiness
integration_readiness.sub_title: The solution was fully integrated into existing infrastructure:
list: Connected with ERP, reporting tools, and internal systems
No disruption to ongoing operations during deployment
Aligned with governance frameworks and security policies
Configured to match organizational workflows

operational_impact.title: Operational Impact
list: 60–80% faster information retrieval
Up to 85% reduction in manual reporting workload
Real-time operational visibility across departments
Significant improvement in decision-making speed
Enhanced workflow efficiency and execution tracking

results.title: Results
results.sub_title: Improved operational efficiency and system reliability
list: Faster and more informed executive decisions
Reduced dependency on manual processes
Scalable infrastructure supporting long-term growth

conclusion.title: Conclusion
conclusion.description: By implementing a structured operational intelligence system, OpsIntel Solutions successfully transformed its operational model from fragmented and manual to intelligent, automated, and data-driven.

casestudy.description: Assesses how seamlessly the system can integrate with existing infrastructure, including ERP systems, databases...

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: This Privacy Policy describes the policies and procedures of Beyond Code on the collection, use, and disclosure of Your information when You use our services and websites, and explains Your privacy rights and how applicable laws protect You.

sections.title: Interpretation
sections.content: Words with capitalized initials have meanings defined under the following conditions. These definitions apply regardless of whether they appear in singular or plural form.

sections.title: Definitions
sections.intro: For the purposes of this Privacy Policy:
list: Account means a unique account created for You to access our Service or parts of our Service.
Company (referred to as “Beyond Code”, “We”, “Us”, or “Our”) refers to Beyond Code, operating through arclab.ae and beyondcode.ae.
Cookies are small files placed on Your computer, mobile device, or any other device by a website, containing details of Your browsing history.
Country refers to the countries where Beyond Code operates, including the United Arab Emirates, United Kingdom, and Bangladesh.
Device means any device that can access the Service such as a computer, a mobile phone, or a digital tablet.
Personal Data is any information that relates to an identified or identifiable individual.
Service refers to the Beyond Code websites and related services.
Service Provider means any natural or legal person who processes data on behalf of the Company, including third-party vendors engaged to facilitate or analyze the Service.
Usage Data refers to data collected automatically, either generated by the use of the Service or from the Service infrastructure.
Website refers to Beyond Code, accessible from arclab.ae and beyondcode.ae.
You means the individual or legal entity accessing or using the Service.

sections.title: Collecting and Using Your Personal Data

subSections.title: Personal Data
subSections.content: While using Our Service, We may ask You to provide certain personally identifiable information that can be used to contact or identify You. This may include, but is not limited to:
list: First name and last name
Email address
Phone number
Address, city, state/province, ZIP/postal code

subSections.title: Usage Data
subSections.content: Usage Data is collected automatically when using the Service and may include information such as:
list: IP address
Browser type and version
Pages visited and time spent on those pages
Date and time of visits
Device identifiers and diagnostic data
subSections.note: When You access the Service via a mobile device, We may also collect information such as device type, operating system, mobile browser type, and mobile IP address.

sections.title: Tracking Technologies and Cookies

subSections.title: Necessary / Essential Cookies
list: Type: Session Cookies
Purpose: Enable core functionality, user authentication, and fraud prevention.

subSections.title: Cookies Policy / Notice Acceptance Cookies
list: Type: Persistent Cookies
Purpose: Store Your consent preferences regarding cookies.

subSections.title: Functionality Cookies
list: Type: Persistent Cookies
Purpose: Remember Your preferences such as language or region to provide a personalized experience.

sections.note: You may configure Your browser to refuse Cookies. However, some parts of the Service may not function properly without them.

sections.title: Use of Your Personal Data
sections.content: ArcLab may use Personal Data for the following purposes:
list: To provide, operate, and maintain our Service
To monitor and analyze Service usage
To manage Your Account and registrations
To perform contractual obligations and deliver services
To contact You via email, phone, or other electronic communications
To provide updates, marketing communications, and relevant information (unless You opt out)
To manage inquiries and support requests
To evaluate or conduct business transfers such as mergers or acquisitions
For data analysis, service improvement, and marketing effectiveness

sections.title: Sharing of Your Personal Data
sections.content: We may share Your Personal Data in the following situations:
list: With Service Providers who assist in operating or analyzing the Service
During business transfers, such as mergers or acquisitions
With affiliates under common control, who are required to follow this Privacy Policy
With business partners for relevant offerings or promotions
With other users, if You voluntarily share information in public areas
With Your consent, for any other disclosed purpose

sections.title: Retention of Your Personal Data
content: ArcLab retains Personal Data only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Privacy Policy, comply with legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce agreements.
Usage Data is generally retained for a shorter duration unless required for security, functionality improvements, or legal compliance.

sections.title: Transfer of Your Personal Data
content: Your information may be processed and stored in locations where ArcLab or its Service Providers operate. Data protection laws in these locations may differ from those in Your jurisdiction.
By submitting Your information, You consent to such transfers. We take reasonable steps to ensure appropriate safeguards are in place to protect Your data.

sections.title: Delete Your Personal Data
content: You have the right to request deletion of Your Personal Data. You may update, correct, or delete Your information by accessing Your Account settings or by contacting Us directly.
We may retain certain information where required by law or for legitimate business purposes.

sections.title: Disclosure of Your Personal Data
content: Business Transactions
If ArcLab is involved in a merger, acquisition, or asset sale, Your Personal Data may be transferred. We will notify You before such data becomes subject to a different Privacy Policy.

sections.title: Law Enforcement and Legal Requirements
sections.content: We may disclose Personal Data if required to do so by law or in response to valid legal requests, or when necessary to:
list: Comply with legal obligations
Protect the rights or property of ArcLab
Prevent or investigate wrongdoing
Protect the safety of users or the public
Defend against legal liability

sections.title: Security of Your Personal Data
sections.content: We take commercially reasonable measures to protect Your Personal Data. However, no method of transmission over the Internet or electronic storage is completely secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

sections.title: Children’s Privacy
sections.content: Our Service does not address individuals under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect Personal Data from children under 13 without parental consent. If such data is discovered, we will take steps to remove it promptly.

sections.title: Links to Other Websites
sections.content: Our Service may contain links to third-party websites not operated by Us. We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of those websites and encourage You to review their privacy policies.

sections.title: Changes to This Privacy Policy
sections.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated “Last updated” date. Significant changes may also be communicated via email or prominent notices on our Service.

sections.title: Contact Us
sections.content: If You have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact Us:

terms.title: Terms of Use
intro: These Terms of Use outline the rules and regulations for using Beyond Code’s websites and services, accessible at: www.beyondcode.ae
Beyond Code is an MVP design and development agency operating in Abu Dhabi (UAE), London (UK), and Dhaka (Bangladesh).
By accessing or using our Website or Services, You agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If You do not agree with any part of these terms, please do not use our Website or Services.

sections.title: Interpretation and Definitions
content: The following terminology applies to these Terms of Use, Privacy Policy, Disclaimer Notice, and all Agreements:
list: “Client,” “You,” and “Your” refers to the individual or legal entity accessing this Website and complying with these Terms.
“Company,” “Beyond Code,” “We,” “Us,” and “Our” refers to Beyond Code.
“Party” or “Parties” refers to both the Client and Beyond Code.
sections.note: Any use of the above terminology in the singular, plural, capitalization, or gender is taken as interchangeable.

sections.title: Use of the Website
content: By using this Website, You warrant that You are at least 18 years of age or accessing the Website under the supervision of a legal guardian, and that You will use the Website in compliance with all applicable laws and regulations. You agree not to use the Website for any unlawful or prohibited purpose.

sections.title: Cookies
content: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance user experience and website functionality. By accessing Beyond Code, You agree to the use of cookies in accordance with our Privacy Policy. Some third-party partners or service providers may also use cookies.

sections.title: Intellectual Property Rights
content: Unless otherwise stated, Beyond Code and/or its licensors own all intellectual property rights for all content, materials, designs, text, graphics, and software available on the Website.
All intellectual property rights are reserved. You may access the Website for Your personal or internal business use, subject to the restrictions set out in these Terms.
sections.subTitle: You must not:
list: Republish material from Beyond Code
Sell, rent, or sub-license material from Beyond Code
Reproduce, duplicate, or copy material from Beyond Code
Redistribute content from Beyond Code without prior written permission
sections.note: This Agreement shall begin on the date You first access the Website.

sections.title: Hyperlinking to Our Content
content: Organizations may link to Beyond Code’s Website provided that the link:
list: Is not deceptive or misleading
Does not falsely imply sponsorship, endorsement, or approval
Fits within the context of the linking party’s site

extra.title: We may approve link requests from:
list: Commonly known consumer or business information sources
Online communities and directories
Charitable organizations and associations
Educational institutions and trade associations
Professional service firms (e.g., legal, accounting, consulting)

extra.title: Approved organizations may hyperlink to our Website by:
list: Using our corporate name, or
Using the URL being linked to, or
Using a description that reasonably fits the context of the linking site

sections.note: No use of Beyond Code’s logo or brand assets is permitted without prior written trademark or brand license approval.

sections.title: iFrames
content: Without prior written permission, You may not create frames around our Webpages that alter the visual presentation or appearance of the Website.

sections.title: Content Liability
content: We shall not be held responsible for any content that appears on Your Website. You agree to indemnify and defend Beyond Code against all claims arising from content on Your Website.
No link(s) should appear on any Website that may be interpreted as defamatory, obscene, illegal, or that infringes or violates any third-party rights.

sections.title: Reservation of Rights
content: We reserve the right to request removal of any links to our Website. You agree to remove such links immediately upon request.
We also reserve the right to amend these Terms of Use and our linking policy at any time. Continued use of the Website constitutes acceptance of any changes.

sections.title: Removal of Links from Our Website
content: If You find any link on our Website offensive or inappropriate, You may contact us at any time. While we will review such requests, we are not obligated to remove links or respond directly.

sections.title: Accuracy of Information
content: We do not guarantee that the information on this Website is accurate, complete, or up to date. We do not warrant that the Website will always be available or that its content will remain current.

sections.title: Disclaimer
content: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, Beyond Code excludes all representations, warranties, and conditions relating to the Website and its use.
Nothing in this Disclaimer shall:
list: Limit or exclude liability for fraud or fraudulent misrepresentation
Limit liabilities in any way not permitted by applicable law
Exclude liabilities that cannot be excluded under applicable law
note: The limitations of liability apply to all claims arising under contract, tort, or statutory duty.
As long as the Website and its information are provided free of charge, Beyond Code shall not be liable for any loss or damage of any nature.

sections.title: Governing Law
content: These Terms of Use shall be governed by and construed in accordance with applicable laws relevant to Beyond Code’s operating jurisdictions, without regard to conflict of law principles.

sections.title: Changes to These Terms
content: We may revise these Terms of Use at any time. Updates will be posted on this page with an updated “Last updated” date. Continued use of the Website after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

sections.title: Contact Us
content: If You have any questions or concerns about these Terms of Use, please contact us:
